captures.label: Captures semantic adjacency
captures.explanation: The method shows when concepts become structurally near each other in the analyzed semantic space.
captures.example: A therapeutic concept can become adjacent to VR through immersion and activity terms before direct co-labeling dominates.

captures.label: Captures community separation
captures.explanation: It preserves whether neighboring concepts still sit across community boundaries.
captures.example: Two concepts may be close but still belong to distinct semantic communities.

captures.label: Captures unresolved loop structure
captures.explanation: Persistent H1 loops indicate a boundary state where closure is not yet complete.
captures.example: A ring of concepts appears while key filling edges are still absent.

captures.label: Captures yearly topology-derived summaries
captures.explanation: Year-level aggregates describe structural condition per year.
captures.example: Total persistent H1 and triadic closure summarize a year without asserting stable loop identity over time.

doesNotEstablish.label: Does not establish causality
doesNotEstablish.explanation: Structural adjacency does not identify the social or epistemic cause of integration.
doesNotEstablish.example: A loop closing does not prove why that closure happened.

doesNotEstablish.label: Does not establish author intent
doesNotEstablish.explanation: The method analyzes published concept structure, not researcher motivations.
doesNotEstablish.example: It cannot infer whether authors intentionally built a bridge between areas.

doesNotEstablish.label: Does not establish institutional interdisciplinarity
doesNotEstablish.explanation: Cross-area in this project is semantic, not organizational.
doesNotEstablish.example: A cross-community loop does not prove collaboration across departments or institutions.

doesNotEstablish.label: Does not establish one unique true path
doesNotEstablish.explanation: Representative cycles are readable reconstructions among valid alternatives.
doesNotEstablish.example: Multiple cycle realizations can support the same boundary interpretation.

doesNotEstablish.label: Does not track the same loop across years as a persistent identity
doesNotEstablish.explanation: Yearly summaries are recomputed independently by year.
doesNotEstablish.example: A high H1 year does not imply one specific loop persisted unchanged from previous years.
